name: obs
description: Personal Obsidian notes management — project lifecycle, sessions, meetings, invoices, RAG export; email triage; solo TTRPG domain tooling (pc, rpg, solo-mc) on autonomous local game domains; the Documents/ organiser tree (cache-based: index, check, fix, sort, judge, destinations); and brief/lore/data assembly for writing: brief (builds the portable _brief/ working dir), forge (concept), research (data), lore-extract, rules-keeper, extract-pdf.
